hero.headline: Counsel you can count on
hero.subheadline: Practical legal guidance for businesses and individuals. Clear communication, fair billing, and results that hold up.

featured.name: Business Formation
featured.description: LLC setup, partnership agreements, operating agreements, and corporate governance. Get the foundation right.

featured.name: Contract Review
featured.description: We review, draft, and negotiate contracts so you understand exactly what you're signing.

featured.name: Dispute Resolution
featured.description: When things go sideways, we work toward resolution — through negotiation first, litigation when necessary.

services.name: Business Formation & Governance
services.description: Entity selection, formation documents, operating agreements, bylaws, and ongoing corporate compliance. We help you structure your business to protect personal assets and set up clean governance from the start.

services.name: Contract Drafting & Review
services.description: Commercial leases, vendor agreements, employment contracts, NDAs, and partnership agreements. Every contract reviewed with an eye for risk and plain-language clarity.

services.name: Commercial Litigation
services.description: Breach of contract, business torts, partnership disputes, and collections. We pursue resolution efficiently — most cases settle before trial.

services.name: Real Estate Transactions
services.description: Purchase agreements, title review, closing coordination, and lease negotiations for commercial and residential properties.

credentials: Admitted to U.S. District Court, Southern District of Georgia

testimonials.name: Robert K., Business Owner
testimonials.text: They handled our LLC formation and commercial lease. Everything was explained clearly, no surprises on the bill. We've referred three other businesses.

testimonials.name: Patricia S., Real Estate Developer
testimonials.text: Sharp, responsive, and practical. They don't over-lawyer things — they find solutions and move the deal forward.

testimonials.name: Daniel M., Startup Founder
testimonials.text: Helped us navigate a complicated partnership dispute. Professional throughout, and the outcome was better than we expected.

team.name: Catherine Harlow
team.title: Managing Partner
team.bio: 20 years of business law experience. Catherine advises closely-held businesses on formation, governance, and growth. Known for direct communication and practical counsel.

team.name: David Park
team.title: Senior Associate
team.bio: Focuses on commercial litigation and contract disputes. David clerked for the Southern District of Georgia before joining the firm. Thorough researcher, effective negotiator.

team.name: Maria Santos
team.title: Associate
team.bio: Handles real estate transactions and business formation. Maria's background in commercial banking gives her a practical edge in deal work.
